external_writes: session persistent memory (harness memory contract): eneco_vpp_agg_influxdb_401.md + MEMORY.md pointer

runtime_attacks.claim: The §5c-pw password pipeline leaves the secret available to the parent shell.
runtime_attacks.meaning: The documented UI fallback cannot supply the password under default Bash pipeline semantics.

gate_witnesses.claim: The runbook is not safe to approve as written.
gate_witnesses.surface: how-to-fix.md lines 33-36, 155-170, 224-229, and 293-308 plus the clean-Bash runtime attack
gate_witnesses.falsifier: Every mutating and secret-bearing OpenShift call is pinned through ocx; discovery, rollout, verification, and revocation use the same closed consumer set; and per-writer post-rollout effects are non-vacuous and attributable.
gate_witnesses.result: FAILED: raw oc remains on Influx mutations and the tunnel, non-Deployment consumers are advisory-only, and verification admits empty/unattributed paths.
